hooks.command: source /Users/arobel/repos/nd-mock/.venv/bin/activate && ruff format --line-length 180 "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && ruff check --fix --line-length 180 "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; true
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q 'app/v1/'; then /Users/arobel/repos/nd-mock/.venv/bin/pytest tests/unit/ -x -q 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(env|db)$' && echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit .env or .db files' && exit 1 || exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '(schema/|uv\.lock)' && echo 'BLOCK: Schema and lock files should not be modified' || true
